leadText: The Power Lens (Japanese: パワーレンズ Power Lens) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is a Power item that gives Special Attack effort values to the holder whenever it gains experience.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV-VI 1.1.2 Generation VII onwards 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV-VI [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon holding this item gains 4 Special Attack EVs whenever it gains experience in battle (EVs are awarded for each Pokémon knocked out in Horde Battles despite experience being gained all at once); its effect is doubled by Pokérus . (In Generation IV , level 100 Pokémon cannot gain EVs in battle; from Generation V onward, they gain EVs whenever they would earn experience.) The Speed stat of the Pokémon holding this item is halved in battle. Generation VII onwards [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon holding this item now gains 8 Special Attack EVs instead of 4 whenever it gains experience during battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver onward, if this item is held by a parent when breeding at Pokémon Day Care or a Pokémon Nursery , the Special Attack IV of a parent holding a Power Lens will always be passed down to the child. If both parents hold a Power Lens, one parent will be selected at random to pass down its Special Attack IV.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV-VI [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon holding this item gains 4 Special Attack EVs whenever it gains experience in battle (EVs are awarded for each Pokémon knocked out in Horde Battles despite experience being gained all at once); its effect is doubled by Pokérus . (In Generation IV , level 100 Pokémon cannot gain EVs in battle; from Generation V onward, they gain EVs whenever they would earn experience.) The Speed stat of the Pokémon holding this item is halved in battle. Generation VII onwards [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon holding this item now gains 8 Special Attack EVs instead of 4 whenever it gains experience during battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that promotes Sp. Atk gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that promotes Sp. Atk gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It reduces Speed but allows the holder's Sp. Atk stat to grow more after battling. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. Holding this lens reduces a Pokémon's Speed in battle but allows its Sp. Atk stat to grow more quickly.
